Overview Quick start Schema architecture Interactive samples Root schema agent-collection agents example extends extensions link presentation purpose rich-text status system-metadata component pattern style theme token accessibility anatomy api content design-specifications document-blocks events guideline import interaction motion principle scale state variant aliases category description extends links metadata preview since status summary tags thumbnail
Root Properties Named agent context blocks. Each key is a scope identifier — a component name, a concern area, or a workflow phase. Each value is a full agents block validated against the agents schema. Keys should be lowercase kebab-case for consistency with DSDS entity naming. The version of this collection file. Use for your own versioning — not tied to the DSDS spec version. URI of the schema this file conforms to. Tools can use this for auto-detection and validation. Human-readable name for this collection (e.g., 'Sanity UI Pre-Generation Checklist', 'Material Design Migration Guide'). What this collection covers, who it's for, and how agents should use it. ISO date when this collection was last updated. Where this collection was derived from — a test suite, an audit, a design system package, or a documentation site.

Design System Documentation Spec (DSDS) 0.1 — Draft Specification

GitHub
